<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets information related to a specific build."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{project}/versions/{version}/builds/{build}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
